content:
Happy to share that I participated in the Yours In Law Online Quiz Competition on the Indian Contract Act, 1872 and received a Certificate of Participation. ⚖️✨

It was a wonderful experience that challenged my legal knowledge and encouraged me to keep learning every day.

Thank you, Yours In Law , and its director Sudhanshu Kumar for organizing this initiative.♥️
